zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Cam Fitzgerald於大約1430年出生在愛爾蘭萊音斯特時，她的父親James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond51歲，母親Mary de Burke of Clanicarde41歲。她於1456年與Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1486年6月13日在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克阿達享年57歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克阿達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Cam Fitzgerald于大约1430年出生在爱尔兰萊音斯特时，她的父亲James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond51岁，母亲Mary de Burke of Clanicarde41岁。她于1456年与Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1486年6月13日在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克阿達享年57岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克阿達。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzgerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Cam Fitzgerald was born about 1430, in Leinster, Ireland, her father, James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond, was 51 and her mother, Mary de Burke of Clanicarde, was 41. She married Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare in 1456, in County Kildare, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 13 June 1486, in Adare, County Limerick, Ireland, at the age of 57, and was buried in Adare, County Limerick, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Cam Fitzgerald est née environ 1430, à Leinster, Irlande, son père, James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Mary de Burke of Clanicarde, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare en 1456, à County Kildare, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 juin 1486, à Adare, County Limerick, Irlande, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Adare, County Limerick, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Cam Fitzgerald um 1430 in Leinster, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond 51 und ihre Mutter Mary de Burke of Clanicarde 41. Sie hat 1456 in County Kildare, Irland Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Juni 1486 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Adare, County Limerick, Irland und wurde in Adare, County Limerick, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Cam Fitzgerald è nata il circa 1430 nel Leinster, Irlanda, sua padre, James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Mary de Burke of Clanicarde, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare nel 1456, nel County Kildare, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 13 giugno 1486, nel Adare, County Limerick, Irlanda, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Adare, County Limerick, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Cam Fitzgeraldが約1430年にアイルランドレインスターで生まれた時，父James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmondは51歳，母Mary de Burke of Clanicardeは41歳であった。1456年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアでThomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1486年6月13日にアイルランドコウントイ リメリックアダアで57歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ リメリックアダアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Cam Fitzgerald(이)가 대략 1430년 아일랜드 레인스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary de Burke of Clanicarde(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1456년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르에서 Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1486년 6월 13일 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 애더르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 애더르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Cam Fitzgerald nasceu aproximadamente 1430, em Leinster, Irlanda, seu pai, James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Burke of Clanicarde, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare em 1456, em County Kildare, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de junho de 1486, em Adare, County Limerick, Irlanda, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Adare, County Limerick, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Cam Fitzgerald родилась около 1430 г. в местности линстир, Ирландия, её отцу по имени James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Mary de Burke of Clanicarde, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare в 1456 г. в местности коунти каилдар, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 13 июня 1486 г. в местности адар, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности адар, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Cam Fitzgerald nació aproximadamente 1430, en Leinster, Irlanda, su papá, James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Mary de Burke of Clanicarde, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare en 1456, en County Kildare, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 13 de junio de 1486, en Adare, County Limerick, Irlanda, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Adare, County Limerick, Irlanda.
